title: Day Counter
body:
⏳ Day Counter

Reewfe is no longer on modrinth. He has transferred his projects to this account.

📖 About

Day Counter is a minimalistic survival Datapack / Mod that shows how many days you have already played in your Minecraft world.

It was originally created for a hardcore world as a simple and immersive way to track long-term progress.

✨ Features

  • 📅 Displays the total number of days played
  • 💀 Perfect for Hardcore & long-term survival worlds
  • ⚙️ No configuration required
  • 🪶 Lightweight and performance-friendly

ℹ️ Important Info

  • ⚠️ Installing before world creation is recommended
  • 🌍 Mod version can be added to existing worlds

📸 Showcase
